feed.title: AO3 - Merlin/Arthur Pendragon (Merlin) (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Merlin/Arthur Pendragon (Merlin) on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: For you
entry.summary:
Author: KuroNikushimi

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 17,426Chapters: 5/?Kudos: 26

Summary: Arthur gets kidnapped and is supposed to be sacrificed by midday. Merlin frantically searches for him, but can't find him. He comes upon a group of people who know where Arthur is.. They'll tell him, they say, if Merlin sleeps with each of them. And Merlin would do anything for Arthur. Anything. Had graphic rape but afterwards deal with Merlin's ptsd, Arthur's guilt and very slow recovery

entry.title: hopelessly devoted
entry.summary:
Author: mayonaisie

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 370Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 1

Summary: "I am not the one in the wrong here!" Merlin hissed, furiously scrubbing at the floor with the brush like it had something to give him. "You- You have hurt me dozens of times, Arthur!"  "I have hurt you? I haven't been the one lying about my entire identity for years! Did you really take me for a fool this whole time, spinning me around in circles and making a joke of me?"written for @micromerlinfic's april prompts of 'fool' & '"you hurt me"'!

entry.title: New Beginnings
entry.summary:
Author: Moontra992

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 13,357Chapters: 10/?Kudos: 93

Summary: The final battle is won. Merlin has fulfilled his destiny. He is dropped from the sky into a new time and place and seeks to fit in and to figure out his new destiny - if there is any. He comes across a kind and welcoming family but soon realises that nothing is quite as it seems...

entry.title: The Squires of Camelot
entry.summary:
Author: Basched

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 17,000Chapters: 170/?Kudos: 144

Summary: In a land of myth and a time of magic, destiny rests on the shoulders of five young boys, along with a lot of grueling work, dedication, and long hours of cleaning up after the new knights. They are the Squires of Camelot.

entry.title: Albion's Greatest Need
entry.summary:
Author: AngelOfAlbion

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 43,339Chapters: 6/?Kudos: 58

Summary: “I did not want you to feel that you were alone.” With closed eyes, Merlin reached upward and imagined Arthur’s warm hand wrapping around his own. There was a sick irony in hearing this now, in these final moments. “I did not want you to feel that you were alone.” For Merlin was alone. He died alone. ـــــــــــــــــــﮩ٨ـ After fifteen hundred years, the cessation of Magic forces 'Albion's Greatest Need' to emerge. When both Arthur and Merlin are resurrected, it's Merlin's duty to teach the King of Camelot modern innovation. However, resurrection is not enough, and destiny forces redemption. Or Merlin and Arthur get thrown back in time to their convention with The Disir, only this time, they have no choice but to accept magic.

  • Graphic Depictions Of Violence

entry.title: It's sweet like saccharine
entry.summary:
Author: sug4rd0v3

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,167Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 3

Summary: Camelot is intense the closer she gets. The castle looms, ancient- Imposing. Merilyn's heart pounds beneath the tattered bodice of the dress her mother had agonized over. To ensure she left a good impression on her uncle Gaius. Merilyn knows deep down as her feet hit worn cobblestone, she is home. Her magic curls lovingly through her veins, something ancient in her aware as acutely as possible today would be the beginning of something extraordinary.

entry.title: Episode 1 - The Golden Kingdom
entry.summary:
Author: so_we_should_have_known

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 11,054Chapters: 8/8Kudos: 3

Summary: The beginning of the tale, six lives interwoven. A pale wraith, a stubborn wildfire, a golden lion; a lilac flower, a weather-torn shield, a cracked mirror. Two servants with inconceivable shared power take their places in the Golden Kingdom of Caltane, setting destiny into motion, a chain of events that will bring about the dawn of the golden age, the prophesied epoch of glory for the twelve kingdoms of Prydein. Love, politics, magic, fantasy. The Destined Reign, Episode 1.

entry.title: Courting the Court Sorcerer
entry.summary:
Author: Harmon_A

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,017Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 15

Summary: It had been a year or so now, since the magic ban had been reversed, months since Merlin became Court Sorcerer. And a few more weeks since Merlin's injury. Arthur had finally given Merlin the Court-Sorcerer chambers he was promised, that just happened to be down the hall from the kings own . Arthur would insist this was not on purpose, but everyone had seen them around the castle, holding and kissing each others hands, teasing each other as usual but with the addition of grinning at each other. There had been a shift in their relationship, and it meant they were more protective of each other than usual. If it wasn't terrifying, it would probably be sweet. But of course this is Camelot, not everything can stay perfect for too long. Destiny would never allow it. --------------------------- A continuation from the previous fic in this series. (read if you want context for Merlin's injury or their realtionship, but not needed)Merlin and Arthur begin courting, Merlin knows nothing about noble courting rules, Arthur will do anything to protect Merlin.

entry.title: it's not my fire, but was forged in flame
entry.summary:
Author: elfesetamour

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 18,655Chapters: 8/?Kudos: 15

Summary: Unable to heal from Camelot’s greatest loss, Merlin is haunted by nightmares—or something more sinister—of Arthur. But, despite the undeniable resemblance, it’s impossible that the Arthur in his dreams is the same one he’d held in his arms as he died. Searching through the Mist, Merlin leaves his old life behind in search of a new destiny, which brings him to Paris, 1643. In a land of feuds and a time of revolution, among old faces as well as new, Merlin searches for meaning side by side with Arthur again. But whether he can come to terms with their differences, or accept his feelings for this new Arthur, all the while protecting him, may be a greater challenge than he signed up for. "That was Arthur, standing right in front of him. Yes, he wasn’t completely the same but that was him-no mistake. A scar visible on his cheek, and that beard covering his face couldn’t fool Merlin. He knew Arthur better than that. " Merlin’s magic takes him on a journey through time to Musketeer Era France, where he meets Arthur, the Captain of the King’s Red Guard. Ruthless, bloodthirsty, and emotionally closed off, Merlin seems unable to deny anything this new Arthur asks of him.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: The Prince, The Warlock & The Healer
entry.summary:
Author: Heratakescamelot

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,984Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 1

Summary: Hera was just looking for a way to escape her master's thesis and, more generally, the impending collapse of her adult life. She didn't expect the universe to take her so literally that it would hurl her straight into the Sixth Century. Trading academic deadlines for Uther Pendragon’s executioner's block was a trauma, but at least no one in Camelot is asking her if she’s finished her bibliography yet. Hidden away in Gaius’s chambers, Hera tries to navigate a world of ancient stones and fierce laws, where she quickly discovers she isn't just an intruder: she is the catalyst uncovering the unspeakable desires that bind Arthur Pendragon and Merlin to one another.

entry.title: Cheekbones & Consequences
entry.summary:
Author: amariis28

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 13,732Chapters: 6/?Kudos: 25

Summary: This wasn’t supposed to happen.At all.But Merlin could never help it, could he?He just had to stick his nose somewhere it was never needed.Now, he was suffering the consequences.He’s been in this position before though. Many times. In fact, if he could recall the number of times he’d begrudgingly sat on this very desk, that had his initials carved from the amount of times he’s been there, he wouldn’t have enough fingers to put down. That includes his toes too.Right next to him, sat Gwaine. Of course, triumphant marked his face. He seemed to enjoy this a lot.*[work in progress]

entry.title: Arthur's journey around the world
entry.summary:
Author: dust_under_the_wardrobe

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 51,871Chapters: 11/?Kudos: 68

Summary: When Arthur returns to Merlin in 2025, both of them are ecstatic. Merlin helps Arthur getting used to the world by showing him everything. Or: Basically Merlin and Arthur being weird tourists around the world. Lots of fluff (no smut, sorry, but you can imagine it, though:D), nearly no angst, just a cute tooth-rottingly sweet story to comfort your soul.

entry.title: Destiny Unfold
entry.summary:
Author: chronic_pain_in_the_ass

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 124,187Chapters: 11/65Kudos: 112

Summary: No young man, no matter how great, or mystic can know his destiny. He cannot glimpse his part in the great story that is about to unfold. Like everyone, he must live and learn. And so, it will be for the young magic arriving at the gates of Camelot. A boy that will, in time, father the legend. His name: Merlin.OrA rewrite of Merlin if the writers weren’t cowards. A lot gayer, magic users aren’t the enemy in every single episode, and Uther is the actual villain of the story. Morgana is still a villain, but we have sympathy for her.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: When destiny gives you second chances
entry.summary:
Author: justs0me_randomauth0r

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,806Chapters: 5/?Kudos: 18

Summary: Destiny plays a cruel game with us. It lets us hope, lets us believe we are in control, just for things to end the way we knew they would anyways. But sometimes, to it’s very favorites, destiny will be kind. One of those favorites is Merlin. And what if this time it will actually end differently? What if this time he would find a way to show Morgana that violence was not the only option? What if this time, he could help Mordred not loose his loyalty. What if this time he could be honest with this man earlier on? Share his secret with him and show what magic can also be. Show him the beauty and peace it can bring. And what if this time he could build the courage to tell Arthur how he truly felt, before it will be too late again? If he could do all those things, could the ending truly be changed? Could he watch Arthur be the king he was destined to be instead of watching the love of his life die in his arms without him ever truly knowing what he meant for the young warlock? Merlin wasn’t sure. Anything he had ever done to try and change the cause of events had led to the exact situations he tried to avoid. But if destiny gives you a chance like this, you use it. Even if it may just mean reliving your losses once again…

  • Graphic Depictions Of Violence
  • Major Character Death
